description: LLVM toolchain for Flutter development. Version is configurable via PREFER_LLVM environment variable.

cmds: if [ $(lsb_release -rs | cut -d '.' -f1) -ge 24 ] && [ ${PREFER_LLVM} -lt 16 ]; then echo 'LLVM version ${PREFER_LLVM} is not supported on Ubuntu 24 or later.'; exit 1; fi
sudo apt-get install -yq lsb-release wget software-properties-common gnupg apt-file

if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then sudo apt-get upgrade -yq --fix-missing || sudo apt-get upgrade -yq -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confdef" -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confold" || echo 'Upgrade completed with some errors - continuing'; else sudo apt-get upgrade -yq; fi
sudo apt-get install -yq libxkbcommon-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols mesa-common-dev libegl1-mesa-dev libgles2-mesa-dev mesa-utils libsecret-1-dev libsdl2-dev libjpeg-dev zenity
if [ $(lsb_release -rs | cut -d '.' -f1) -ge 24 ] && [ ${PREFER_LLVM} -lt 16 ]; then echo 'LLVM version ${PREFER_LLVM} is not supported on Ubuntu 24 or later.'; exit 1; fi
sudo apt-get install -yq lsb-release wget software-properties-common gnupg apt-file

if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then sudo apt-get upgrade -yq --fix-missing || sudo apt-get upgrade -yq -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confdef" -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confold" || echo 'Upgrade completed with some errors - continuing'; else sudo apt-get upgrade -yq; fi
sudo apt-get install -yq libxkbcommon-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols mesa-common-dev libegl1-mesa-dev libgles2-mesa-dev mesa-utils libsecret-1-dev libsdl2-dev libjpeg-dev zenity

if [ $(rpm -E %fedora) -le 42 ]; then sudo dnf -y install libxkbcommon-devel wayland-devel wayland-protocols-devel mesa-dri-drivers mesa-filesystem mesa-libEGL-devel mesa-libGL-devel mesa-libGLU-devel mesa-libgbm-devel mesa-libxatracker; fi

if [ $(rpm -E %fedora) -ge 43 ]; then sudo dnf -y install libxkbcommon-devel wayland-devel wayland-protocols-devel mesa-dri-drivers mesa-filesystem mesa-libEGL-devel mesa-libGL-devel mesa-libGLU-devel mesa-libgbm-devel mesa-compat-libxatracker; fi

export VV=${PREFER_LLVM}; CURRENT_LLVM=$(dnf -y info llvm 2>/dev/null | awk '/^Version/ {print $3;exit}' | cut -d. -f1); if [[ $CURRENT_LLVM == $PREFER_LLVM ]]; then export VV=''; fi; echo $VV > .llvm-version
VV=$(cat .llvm-version); if [[ -n $VV ]]; then sudo dnf copr enable @fedora-llvm-team/llvm${PREFER_LLVM} -y; fi
VV=$(cat .llvm-version); sudo dnf -y install llvm${VV}-devel clang${VV} clang${VV}-tools-extra lldb lld${VV}
if [ $(rpm -E %fedora) -le 42 ] || [ $PREFER_LLVM -ge 19 ]; then VV=$(cat .llvm-version); sudo dnf -y install --setopt=exclude= libcxx-devel libcxx-static libcxxabi-devel libcxxabi-static; fi
VV=$(cat .llvm-version); if [[ -n $VV ]]; then sudo dnf copr remove @fedora-llvm-team/llvm${PREFER_LLVM} -y; fi
if [ $(rpm -E %fedora) -ge 43 ] && [ $PREFER_LLVM -lt 19 ]; then sudo dnf copr enable @fedora-llvm-team/llvm20 -y; fi

if [ $(rpm -E %fedora) -ge 43 ] && [ $PREFER_LLVM -lt 19 ]; then VV=$(cat .llvm-version); sudo dnf -y install --setopt=exclude= libcxx-devel-20.* libcxx-static-20.* libcxxabi-devel-20.* libcxxabi-static-20.*; fi

if [ $(rpm -E %fedora) -ge 43 ] && [ $PREFER_LLVM -lt 19 ]; then sudo dnf copr remove @fedora-llvm-team/llvm20 -y; sudo dnf config-manager setopt exclude=libcxx,libcxx-devel,libcxx-static,libcxxabi,libcxxabi-devel,libcxxabi-static; fi
